evidence: Spike complete. Wrote .omc/research/auggie-sdk-spike.md and .omc/research/auggie-indexing-spike.md (frontmatter present, dash scan clean). Headline: no Python auggie-sdk exists; Auggie is npm CLI @augmentcode/auggie v0.28.0 (commit 63537d73), proprietary subscription license. Spine decision: SUBPROCESS (adapters/claude.py:26 precedent); subprocess-fallback trigger fired on no-usable-Python-SDK. Capability matrix grounded from auggie --help: model listing PASS (auggie model list --json), sessions PASS (-c/-r/session), one-shot PASS (-p --output-format json), tools/function-calling PASS (--permission/--remove-tool/tools), event-streaming UNKNOWN (--acp/--mcp surfaces exist, SSE mapping unexercised), mock testability UNKNOWN pending harness. Indexing: NO global per-invocation hard-disable flag (--allow-indexing only skips confirmation; --print forces indexing); per-directory deny PROVEN via settings indexingDenyDirs (resolver returns 'never' + emits 'Warning: Indexing disabled'; observed: ~/.augment/settings.json already denies /Users/andreburgstahler/Ws/Personal, the repo parent). Verdict: hard-disable unproven (literal must be used, not 'disabled'). Default workspace decision: no-workspace/sandbox via -w empty dir, never caller workspace; do not mutate user global settings as default.

evidence: G003 complete. Extended APP_PROVIDER_PREFIXES (responses_app.py:42) to frozenset{claude,copilot,auggie,deepseek} and updated module/class/build_app docstrings. Created src/reverso/proxy/compose.py: CompositionRoot front dispatcher owns port 64946, routes first-party prefixes (claude/copilot/auggie/deepseek via split_provider_path) to build_app(build_adapters()) gateway, delegates everything else to lazily-imported legacy reverso.proxy.app:app. Repointed reverso/proxy/main.py uvicorn target from reverso.proxy.app:app to reverso.proxy.compose:app (one-line rollback documented inline). Guard test (tests/unit/test_litellm_quarantine.py): runtime tripwire now asserts zero litellm.proxy.proxy_server.app invocations across all 4 prefixes incl /auggie and /deepseek; new test_composition_root_bypasses_legacy_for_first_party_prefixes asserts the legacy wrapper is bypassed for first-party prefixes and a non-first-party control path (/v1/models) still falls through to legacy; import-graph subprocess test unchanged (responses_app excludes reverso.proxy.app + litellm.proxy.proxy_server). Regression: test_legacy_profile_routing_unchanged_by_first_party_migration locks PROVIDER_PREFIXES=={deepseek,claude} (auggie/copilot not leaked) and resolve_profile_model tier mappings. Verified: uv run pytest tests/unit -q = 156 passed; compose import graph excludes legacy app + litellm eagerly (lazy); dash scan clean.

evidence: G004 complete. Extended the provider-agnostic Codex parity harness to all four providers: tests/integration/test_responses_provider_contract.py PROVIDERS=[claude,copilot,auggie,deepseek] (7-fixture matrix x4 providers = 28 passing via the provider-agnostic FixtureAdapter; no FixtureAdapter logic change needed, fixtures encoded no claude/copilot-only assumption); updated tests/fixtures/responses/manifest.json providers + tests/integration/conftest.py docstrings. Added the genuinely-missing falsifiable safety test tests/unit/test_provider_no_hidden_execution.py (6 tests): Auggie one create_response/stream turn invokes injected cli_runner exactly once AND a monkeypatched subprocess.run spy asserts 0 real spawns; tool-style payload does not auto-execute; DeepSeek one turn = exactly one upstream POST counted via httpx MockTransport even when tool_calls present (surfaced as function_call items, no follow-up call). Added tests/unit/test_provider_safety_suite.py (5 tests) consolidating cross-provider safety: hard-disable unproven literal present and not 'disabled'; ephemeral OS-temp sandbox workspace root never the caller path; secret-sentinel non-leakage parametrized across auggie+deepseek (envelope, serialized output, caplog). Adapter-level falsifiable tests (response_format survival, two-turn reasoning_content, sandbox argv, literal, sentinel) already exist in test_auggie/deepseek_adapter.py and were referenced not duplicated. Verified independently: uv run pytest tests/unit tests/integration -q = 214 passed, 4 skipped, no regressions; dash scan rg -nP clean; src/ untouched.

evidence: G005 complete. src/reverso/protocols/adapters/auggie.py: AuggieAdapter implements the frozen 5-method ProviderAdapter (create_response, stream_response, list_models, get_response, list_input_items). Spike-selected spine = bounded subprocess (no Python auggie-sdk exists; claude.py:26 precedent): one-shot completion via 'auggie --print --quiet --output-format json --ask -m <model> --workspace-root <ephemeral sandbox> -- <prompt>'; models via 'auggie model list --json'. Events mapped to the full Responses SSE sequence (response.created/in_progress/output_item.added/content_part.added/output_text.delta/done/content_part.done/output_item.done/completed + [DONE]). Indexing caveat surfaced through list_models: INDEXING_CAVEAT='hard-disable unproven' literal embedded in each model's indexing field (falsifiable, FAILS on 'disabled'). Default workspace root = tempfile.mkdtemp sandbox removed in finally, never the caller workspace. Missing CLI -> AuggieError('auggie CLI not found'); missing OAuth session (AUGMENT_SESSION_AUTH / ~/.augment/session.json existence check) -> bounded AuggieError; timeout -> bounded AuggieError; all diagnostics via redact_secret/redact_mapping (no token logged). Verified: tests/unit/test_auggie_adapter.py 13 tests + G004 no-hidden-execution + safety suite + 4-provider parity harness all green (214 passed, 4 skipped); dash scan clean.

evidence: G006 complete. src/reverso/protocols/adapters/deepseek.py: DeepSeekAdapter implements the frozen 5-method ProviderAdapter, calling DeepSeek's OpenAI-compatible API directly (DEEPSEEK_API_BASE=https://api.deepseek.com/v1, POST /chat/completions) and does NOT inherit _codex_drop_params. Text + streaming (PASS): unary create_response maps chat->ResponseEnvelope; stream_response re-emits the full Responses SSE sequence. JSON mode (PASS, promoted): _build_body forwards every request.extra key unchanged so response_format survives to the upstream body (falsifiable test test_response_format_survives_to_upstream_body green). Thinking mode (PASS, promoted): _map_completion stores reasoning_content on envelope.raw and _prior_turn re-injects it into turn-2 messages on previous_response_id chaining (falsifiable test test_reasoning_content_carries_across_two_turns green). Tool calls: surfaced as function_call output items, never executed (no follow-up upstream call; proven by G004 no-hidden-execution test). API key read at call time from DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, sent as bearer, never logged; diagnostics via redact_mapping (status codes/class names/scrubbed headers only); secret-sentinel non-leakage tests green on success and error. Deprecated-in-place the legacy config/litellm_config.yaml DeepSeek entries (deepseek-v4-pro/flash/reasoner/chat) with an ADR 0003 banner: superseded by the first-party adapter, retained ONLY as the rollback path, not deleted (config-targets test still green). Verified: tests/unit/test_deepseek_adapter.py 11 tests + profile_routing 29 + full suite 214 passed, 4 skipped; dash scan clean.

verification.evidence: Full suite green: uv run pytest tests/unit tests/integration -q = 224 passed, 4 skipped, exit 0 (includes new gpt-4.1 tier-mapping parametrize, extra-clobber guard, and mid-stream store-ordering tests for both adapters). LiteLLM quarantine preserved: fresh-subprocess import-graph test confirms reverso.proxy.app and litellm.proxy.proxy_server absent from responses_app/adapter import graph; runtime tripwire asserts zero litellm.proxy.proxy_server.app invocations across all four prefixes (claude/copilot/auggie/deepseek). DeepSeek alias parity regression-locked: resolve_profile_model('deepseek', ...) maps gpt-5.5/gpt-5.4 -> deepseek-v4-pro and gpt-5.4-mini/gpt-5.3-codex-spark/gpt-4.1 -> deepseek-v4-flash. Dash gate CLEAR.

codeReview.evidence: Independent code review in a separate opus lane (no self-approval per OMC rule) returned VERDICT: APPROVE with 0 Critical / 0 High. The two non-blocking Medium findings were fixed not punted: (1) extra-carry-through shadowing of adapter-owned body keys, fixed by expanding _NON_FORWARDED_EXTRA to deny input/instructions/model/messages/stream/tools/tool_choice; (2) mid-stream-disconnect store ordering, fixed by storing the response envelope before emitting SSE events in both deepseek.py and auggie.py. Optional reviewer Low (gpt-4.1 tier-mapping coverage) also addressed. Architect-level concerns CLEAR: composition root owns 127.0.0.1:64946 with no new process, LiteLLM quarantine intact, single source of truth for alias resolution, rollback documented in ADR 0003 (repoint main.py boot target reverso.proxy.compose:app -> reverso.proxy.app:app, no schema/data migration). Constraints honored: loopback-only bind; no secrets in VCS/logs; YAML frontmatter on every .md; no spec content deleted; uv-managed Python. No commit or PR created -- standing rule requires explicit user approval.
